description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy modeled after Eevee, a popular Pokémon character. It features large, upright ears with dark brown inner coloring, a round face with big, expressive black eyes, and a small, smiling mouth. The toy's body is covered in light brown fabric, with a fluffy white collar around its neck and a bushy tail tipped with white. Its legs are short and stubby, giving it a cute and approachable appearance. The overall surface appears soft and matte, typical of high-quality plush toys, and the stitching is clean and well-defined.
description: A soft, plush Eevee stuffed toy with large ears, a fluffy white collar, and a bushy tail. Its face is expressive and friendly, with big eyes and a gentle smile.
description_view_0: Front view shows the toy's large ears, round face, big eyes, and fluffy white collar.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, ear, and the bushy tail extending behind.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the full fluffy collar, and the white-tipped tail.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side of the face, ear, and tail.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is friendly and inviting, with large, wide-open black eyes and a small, gentle smile. The eyebrows are neutral, contributing to a cute and approachable look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing on all four legs with the head facing forward, ears perked up, and tail slightly raised behind.
